productDisplayName: Hanes Men Blue Ultimate Duo Dry Cotton Stretch Hip Briefs
description: Composition Blue hip briefs from hanes, made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, strong and flexible elastic with brand name, duo-dry moisture management technology, reinforced seams and printed label on the inner Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash with like colours in warm water using a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron if needed Hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. Crafted using soft absorbent cotton/lycra blend fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32" The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
